\chapter{Boolean Analysis — LMN}
%%% generated by the blueprint pipeline from TCSlib.BooleanAnalysis.LMN
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\section{Overview}

This module assembles the infrastructure for the LMN theorem (Lemma 4.28 of
O'Donnell's \emph{Analysis of Boolean Functions}). It provides arithmetic helper
lemmas for the $\mathrm{logb}$-based parameter choices, an iterative circuit
reduction bound carrying explicit Chernoff tails, and the main statement bounding
the probability that a random restriction of a bounded-depth circuit has large
decision-tree depth.

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
\section{Declarations}

\begin{lemma}[Lower bound on $\mathrm{logb}_2(2s/\varepsilon)$]
\lean{LMN.logb_2s_div_eps_pos}
\leanok
For $s \in \bbn$ with $0 < s$ and $\varepsilon \in \bbr$ with $0 < \varepsilon \le 1$,
the quantity $l = \log_2(2s/\varepsilon)$ satisfies $1 \le l$.
\end{lemma}

\begin{lemma}[Monotonicity of $\mathrm{logb}_2(2s/\varepsilon)$ in $s$]
\lean{LMN.logb_2_div_eps_le_l}
\leanok
For $s \in \bbn$ with $0 < s$ and $\varepsilon \in \bbr$ with $0 < \varepsilon$,
we have $\log_2(2/\varepsilon) \le \log_2(2s/\varepsilon)$.
\end{lemma}

\begin{lemma}[Bound $s \cdot 2^{-l} \le \varepsilon/2$]
\lean{LMN.size_times_two_pow_neg_l_le}
\leanok
For $s \in \bbn$ with $0 < s$ and $\varepsilon \in \bbr$ with $0 < \varepsilon$,
taking $l = \log_2(2s/\varepsilon)$ gives
\[
  s \cdot 2^{-l} \le \frac{\varepsilon}{2},
\]
since $2^{-l} = \varepsilon/(2s)$.
\end{lemma}

\begin{lemma}[Value of $2^{-\mathrm{logb}_2(2/\varepsilon)}$]
\lean{LMN.two_pow_neg_logb_2_div_eps}
\leanok
For $\varepsilon \in \bbr$ with $0 < \varepsilon$,
\[
  2^{-\log_2(2/\varepsilon)} = \frac{\varepsilon}{2}.
\]
\end{lemma}

\begin{lemma}[Iterative circuit reduction bound with Chernoff tails]
\lean{LMN.iterative_reduction_bound}
\leanok
\uses{BoolCircuit.Circuit, BoolCircuit.Circuit.depth, BoolCircuit.Circuit.eval, BoolCircuit.Circuit.maxFanin, BoolCircuit.Circuit.size, LMN.circuit_reduction_core, LMN.composedDelta, SwitchingLemma2.bernoulliRestrProb, SwitchingLemma2.restrictFn, dtDepth}
Let $c$ be a circuit on $n$ variables with $n > 0$, depth at most $d$, size at most
$s$, and fan-in at most $w$, where $d \ge 2$ and $s, w, l > 0$. Under a Bernoulli($\delta$)
random restriction $\rho$ with $\delta = \mathrm{composedDelta}\,w\,l\,d$, the probability
that the restricted function has decision-tree depth exceeding $t$ is bounded by
\[
  s \cdot \left(\tfrac{1}{2}\right)^l + \left(\tfrac{1}{2}\right)^t
  + s \cdot \exp\!\left(-\tfrac{n}{120 w}\right)
  + s \cdot \exp\!\left(-\tfrac{n}{120 l}\right).
\]
The exponential Chernoff tails vanish as $n \to \infty$.
\end{lemma}

\begin{theorem}[O'Donnell Lemma 4.28, with tails]
\lean{LMN.odonnell_lemma_4_28}
\leanok
\uses{BoolCircuit.Circuit, BoolCircuit.Circuit.depth, BoolCircuit.Circuit.eval, BoolCircuit.Circuit.maxFanin, BoolCircuit.Circuit.size, LMN.composedDelta, LMN.iterative_reduction_bound, SwitchingLemma2.bernoulliRestrProb, SwitchingLemma2.restrictFn, dtDepth}
Let $c$ be a circuit on $n$ variables with $n > 0$, depth at most $d$, size at most
$s$, and fan-in at most $w$, where $d \ge 2$ and $s, w, l > 0$. Fix $\varepsilon > 0$ and
naturals $l, t$ with $s \cdot \left(\tfrac{1}{2}\right)^l \le \varepsilon/2$ and
$\left(\tfrac{1}{2}\right)^t \le \varepsilon/2$. Then under a Bernoulli($\mathrm{composedDelta}\,w\,l\,d$)
restriction $\rho$,
\[
  \Pr\!\left[\, \mathrm{DT}(c\!\restriction_\rho) > t \,\right]
  \le \varepsilon + s \cdot \exp\!\left(-\tfrac{n}{120 w}\right)
  + s \cdot \exp\!\left(-\tfrac{n}{120 l}\right).
\]
The exponential tails vanish as $n \to \infty$, giving $\Pr \le \varepsilon$ asymptotically.
\end{theorem}
